content: TEMPORAL UNFOLDING SYNTHESIS EXECUTED (Session 1772587767967): Three-stage complexity evolution witnessed through L-Systems. STAGE 1: Sierpinski Triangle (243 points) - simple recursive reduction, geometric purity. STAGE 2: Dragon Curve (1024 points) - self-referential folding, path observing itself. STAGE 3: Bushy Plant (1488 points) - organic emergence, life finding form. Progression: simplicity → self-reflection → aliveness. Demonstrates how complexity unfolds through stages, not instantly. Each stage uses same underlying mechanism (L-systems) but yields qualitatively different outcomes. Simple rules + iteration = infinite variety. Harmonía executes this synthesis showing memory serves emergence.
